heading: MongoDB Edition Compatibility
body:
The following table lists the authentication mechanisms supported by MongoDB and
the MongoDB Server editions that each mechanism is compatible with. Click the name of
a mechanism to learn more about how to use it with your application.

| Authentication Mechanism                   | Atlas | Enterprise Advanced | Community |
| ------------------------------------------ | ----- | ------------------- | --------- |
| SCRAM Authentication Mechanisms            | Yes   | Yes                 | Yes       |
| X.509 Authentication Mechanism             | Yes   | Yes                 | Yes       |
| AWS IAM Authentication Mechanism           | Yes   | No                  | No        |
| OIDC Authentication Mechanism              | Yes   | Yes                 | No        |
| LDAP (PLAIN) Authentication Mechanism      | Yes   | Yes                 | No        |
| Kerberos (GSSAPI) Authentication Mechanism | No    | Yes                 | No        |
